name_cn:
Genuine quality
CELINE Small Logo Print Calfskin Boston Bag TRIOMPHE CANVAS logo print, small size is just right for the body, suitable for both tall and petite frames~ Calfskin trim, fabric lining, zip closure, 1 main compartment, interior zip pocket, leather handle 8cm long
Size: 19.5×14×7.5 Material/Brown
Style No.: 197582
